name: gjhinuojbouib
short_description: This is a fairly casual, decompressed and easy-to-operate sandbox survival game. After the game starts, players need to click "ESC" or "E" to pop up the weapon skill page. In the game, you need to kill more and more enemies to collect more and more. gems to strengthen yourself.
detailed_description:
the game is introduced

This game is a sandbox survival monster farming casual decompression game.
In the game, you only need to control a wizard to unlock weapon skills
The game is equipped with 5 kinds of extremely powerful weapon skills for players, which can allow players to farm monsters more easily

Characteristic function

The way players attack people is very simple and very easy
